nasb.text: Now I have come to give you an understanding of what will happen to your people in the latter days, for the vision pertains to the days yet future.”

esv.text: and came to make you understand what is to happen to your people in the latter days. For the vision is for days yet to come.”

cnv.text: 現在我來是要使你明白日後所要發生在你的同胞身上的事，因為這異象是關於將來許多的年日的。”

ccb.text: 我来是要使你明白将来你同胞的遭遇，因为这异象是关于将来的事。”
